On Petition To Release Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rick Elder, 415.355.5021 for Plaintiff/Moving party 365 Liberty Street, LLC.
No other appearance.

Not argued. The Plaintiff requests fees by statue. The request is granted. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER 365 LIBERTY STREET, LLC For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
